message:
🐛 fix: address Copilot review on cardHooks + add keyboard focus to insert button (#8413)

Remove the redundant `if (totalPages > 0)` guard — `totalPages` is
`Math.ceil(...) || 1` so it is always >= 1. This also restores the
magic-numbers ratchet (37 → 36 comparisons, 55 → 54 total) that
regressed in PR #8401.

Add focus-visible styles to the "+" insert-card button so keyboard
users can discover and activate it (was opacity-0 with no focus state).

Rewrap a split-word comment (`no-mutation-\n-during-render`) into a
single token for grep-ability.

Fixes #8404
Fixes #8403

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
